translations.de: Ich habe vor Kurzem den Job gewechselt.
translations.vi: Gần đây tôi đã đổi việc.
translations.nl: Ik ben onlangs van baan veranderd.
translations.hi: मैंने हाल ही में नौकरी बदली है.
translations.ro: Mi-am schimbat locul de muncă recent.
translations.ja: 最近仕事を変えました。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun (1st person singular) in elided form before a vowel or h muet.
Auxiliary verb (present indicative, 1st person singular) forming the passé composé.
Past participle of the main lexical verb; with avoir, no agreement with the subject.
Preposition introducing a complement ('de travail').
Common noun (masculine singular), complement of the preposition 'de'.
Temporal adverb modifying the whole clause.

translations.es: Volviste a ver a Lea hace poco.
translations.de: Du hast Lea kürzlich wieder gesehen.
translations.pt: Você viu a Lea de novo recentemente.
translations.vi: Gần đây bạn đã gặp lại Lea.
translations.nl: Je hebt Lea laatst weer gezien.
translations.hi: तुमने हाल ही में Lea को फिर से देखा.
translations.pl: Ostatnio znowu spotkałeś się z Lea.
translations.id: Kamu baru-baru ini bertemu Lea lagi.
translations.da: Du så Lea igen for nylig.
translations.ja: 最近またレアに会った。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (2nd person singular).
Auxiliary verb (present indicative, 2nd person singular) forming the passé composé.
Past participle of the main verb 'revoir' in a compound past.
Proper noun (person name), direct object of the verb.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause.

sentences.target: On a reçu beaucoup de messages récemment.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ a ʁəsy bo.ku də me.saʒ ʁe.sa.mɑ̃/

translations.fr: On a reçu beaucoup de messages récemment.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ a ʁəsy bo.ku də me.saʒ ʁe.sa.mɑ̃/
translations.en: We received lots of messages recently.
translations.de: Wir haben in letzter Zeit viele Nachrichten bekommen.
translations.it: Di recente abbiamo ricevuto molti messaggi.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们最近收到了很多消息。
translations.yue: 我哋最近收到咗好多訊息。
translations.ru: В последнее время мы получили много сообщений.
translations.vi: Gần đây chúng tôi nhận được rất nhiều tin nhắn.
translations.nl: We hebben de laatste tijd veel berichten ontvangen.
translations.uk: Ми останнім часом отримали багато повідомлень.
translations.hi: हाल ही में हमें बहुत सारे संदेश मिले.
translations.nb: Vi har fått mange meldinger i det siste.
translations.id: Akhir-akhir ini kami menerima banyak pesan.
translations.sv: Vi har fått många meddelanden på sistone.
translations.cs: V poslední době jsme dostali spoustu zpráv.
translations.da: Vi har modtaget mange beskeder på det seneste.
translations.fi: Olemme saaneet viime aikoina paljon viestejä.
translations.ja: 最近たくさんのメッセージを受け取りました。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun (often used colloquially for 'we').
Auxiliary verb (present indicative, 3rd person singular) forming the passé composé.
Past participle of the main verb in a compound past.
Adverb of quantity heading the quantifier phrase 'beaucoup de'.
Preposition linking the quantifier 'beaucoup' to the noun.
Common noun (plural), complement of 'de'; semantic direct object of 'recevoir'.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause.

sentences.target: Mes voisins se sont plaints du bruit récemment.
sentences.reading: /me vwazɛ̃ sə sɔ̃ plɛ̃ dy bʁɥi ʁe.sa.mɑ̃/

translations.fr: Mes voisins se sont plaints du bruit récemment.
translations.ipa: /me vwazɛ̃ sə sɔ̃ plɛ̃ dy bʁɥi ʁe.sa.mɑ̃/
translations.en: My neighbors complained about the noise recently.
translations.es: Hace poco mis vecinos se quejaron del ruido.
translations.de: Meine Nachbarn haben sich neulich über den Lärm beschwert.
translations.it: I miei vicini si sono lamentati del rumore di recente.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的邻居最近抱怨噪音。
translations.yue: 我嘅鄰居最近投訴噪音。
translations.ru: Мои соседи недавно жаловались на шум.
translations.pt: Meus vizinhos reclamaram do barulho recentemente.
translations.he: השכנים שלי התלוננו על הרעש לאחרונה.
translations.tr: Komşularım son zamanlarda gürültüden şikâyet ettiler.
translations.vi: Gần đây hàng xóm của tôi phàn nàn về tiếng ồn.
translations.nl: Mijn buren klaagden laatst over het lawaai.
translations.uk: Мої сусіди нещодавно скаржилися на шум.
translations.hu: A szomszédaim nemrég panaszkodtak a zaj miatt.
translations.hi: मेरे पड़ोसियों ने हाल ही में शोर की शिकायत की.
translations.pl: Moi sąsiedzi ostatnio skarżyli się na hałas.
translations.el: Πρόσφατα οι γείτονές μου παραπονέθηκαν για τον θόρυβο.
translations.nb: Naboene mine klaget nylig over støy.
translations.id: Tetangga saya baru-baru ini mengeluh tentang kebisingan.
translations.sv: Mina grannar klagade nyligen på bullret.
translations.ro: Vecinii mei s-au plâns recent de zgomot.
translations.cs: Moji sousedé si nedávno stěžovali na hluk.
translations.da: Mine naboer klagede over larmen for nylig.
translations.ja: 最近近所の人たちが騒音について苦情を言った。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular possessive determiner, plural form agreeing with 'voisins'.
Common noun (masculine plural), subject of the clause.
Reflexive clitic pronoun (3rd person), required by the pronominal verb 'se plaindre'.
Auxiliary verb (present indicative, 3rd person plural) used with pronominal verbs to form the passé composé.
Past participle of 'se plaindre'; agrees in gender and number (masculine plural) with the subject because the auxiliary is 'être'.
Contraction of 'de' + 'le' introducing the complement required by 'se plaindre de'.
Common noun (masculine singular), object of the preposition 'de'.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause.

My neighbors complained about the noise recently.
